title: xanthocephalum sphaerocephalum
intro: Xanthocephalum sphaerocephalum, also known as the yellow-headed or globe-headed xanthocephalum, is a flowering plant in the aster family (Asteraceae) native to the southwestern United States. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to possess medicinal properties that can help soothe digestive issues, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of xanthocephalum sphaerocephalum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, making it a popular remedy among herbalists. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, or roots are typically used to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
